spec.expr: label_set((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_pv_energy_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) /1000, "series", "PV") or label_set((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_import_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) /1000, "series", "Grid import") or label_set(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_home_energy_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) * -1) /1000, "series", "Home") or label_copy(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_loadpoint_energy_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}",loadpoint!~"$loadpointBlocklist"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month, loadpoint)) * -1) /1000, "loadpoint", "series") or label_set(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) * -1) /1000, "series", "Feed-in")

WITH (
  gridImport = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_import_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month),
  homeEnergy = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_home_energy_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month),
  loadpointEnergy = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_loadpoint_energy_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month),
  pvEnergy = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_pv_energy_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month),
  gridExport = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month),
  autarky = label_set(1 - gridImport / (homeEnergy + loadpointEnergy), "series", "Autarky"),
  selfConsumption = label_set((pvEnergy - gridExport) / pvEnergy, "series", "Self-consumption")
)
autarky or selfConsumption

WITH (
  other = label_set((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_home_energy_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month) - sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_ext_energy_daily_wh{title!="",title!~"$extBlocklist",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) / 1000, "series", "Other"),
  ext = label_copy((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_ext_energy_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}",title!="",title!~"$extBlocklist"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month, title)) / 1000, "title", "series"),
  aux = label_copy((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_aux_energy_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}",title!="",title!~"$auxBlocklist"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month, title)) / 1000, "title", "series")
)
other or ext or aux

WITH (
  batteryNet = ((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_battery_charge_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) - (sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_battery_discharge_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month))) / 1000,
  batteryCharge = label_set((batteryNet > 0), "series", "Battery charge"),
  batteryDischarge = label_set((batteryNet < 0), "series", "Battery discharge"),
  home = label_set((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_home_energy_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) / 1000, "series", "Home"),
  loadpoints = label_copy((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_loadpoint_energy_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}",loadpoint!~"$loadpointBlocklist"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month, loadpoint)) / 1000, "loadpoint", "series")
)
home or sort_by_label(loadpoints, "series") or batteryCharge or batteryDischarge

properties.value: Prix économisé grâce au tarif dynamique

spec.expr:
WITH (
  charge = label_set(sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_battery_charge_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month) / 1000, "series", "Charge"),
  discharge = label_set(sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_battery_discharge_daily_wh{local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month) / 1000, "series", "Discharge")
)
charge or discharge

spec.title: Total pompe à chaleur
spec.description: Énergie annuelle de la pompe à chaleur sur les points de charge correspondants.

spec.title: Répartition des sources de la pompe à chaleur
spec.description: Part estimée du PV, de la décharge batterie et du réseau pour le point de charge de la pompe à chaleur.

spec.title: Total bornes de recharge
spec.description: Énergie de charge annuelle sur les points de charge visibles, hors point de charge de la pompe à chaleur.

spec.title: Répartition des sources des bornes de recharge
spec.description: Part estimée du PV, de la décharge batterie et du réseau pour les points de charge visibles, hors pompe à chaleur.

spec.title: Véhicules
spec.description: La consommation n’est pertinente qu’après plusieurs mois. La charge externe est ignorée et fausse le résultat.

spec.title: Kilomètres mensuels
spec.description: Les kilomètres ne sont relevés que lorsqu’un véhicule est branché. S’il est branché rarement, des kilomètres peuvent manquer.

spec.title: Consommation (kWh/100km)
spec.description: Les valeurs sont approximatives. La charge externe n’est pas incluse et les kilomètres relevés dépendent de la fréquence de branchement du véhicule.

spec.name: dashboardBuild
spec.label: Build
spec.description: Build information is set during deployment.

spec.name: loadpointBlocklist
spec.label: Liste de blocage point de charge

spec.name: vehicleBlocklist
spec.label: Liste de blocage des véhicules
spec.description: Regex for vehicles that should not be shown. Use ^none$ when nothing should be filtered. For multiple exact names use ^(Vehicle A|Vehicle B)$.

spec.name: heatPumpLoadpointRegex
spec.label: Correspondance du point de charge de la pompe à chaleur

spec.name: inverterPortalTitle
spec.label: Nom du portail de l’onduleur
spec.description: Nom du portail de l'onduleur pour le lien du portail.

spec.name: inverterPortalUrl
spec.label: URL du portail de l’onduleur
spec.description: URL utilisée pour ouvrir le portail de l'onduleur.
